pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy might think Brazil’s samba gonna save him, but his oil money strategy with Saudi Arabia is gettin' cooked worse than toast left in the oven.** Brazil's got a history of turning defenders into statues, and Mustard Boy needs them to do their thing, 'cause Zach ain't even on the board yet. But Bubba G’s got Morocco, and he's probably hopin' for a miracle straight outta Casablanca. Lookin' at Gunner’s pickin' style, you'd think he'd been consultin' his pet parrot for advice on draft day. I'm callin' it: Brazil wins by at least two, and Mustard Boy finally gets to taste some sweet, sweet points.

pundit_takes.headline: Brazil and Morocco Set to Define Zach's Strategy
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy's last hope is a tier one miracle.

pundit_takes.headline: Qatar Poised to Challenge Zach's Switzerland in Group B Clash
pundit_takes.subtitle: 'Mustard Boy's' zero-point luxury tour continues in California.

pundit_takes.headline: Haiti Encounter Will Test Devin's Risky Draft Choices
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper banking on World Cup's most unpredictable team.

pundit_takes.headline: Turkey Ready to Deliver for Gayden Against Australia
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Backpass Assassin's daring T3 pick faces underdog trial.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach sitting at zero, probably needs a GPS to find the win column.
Rafe's Tier-1 pick, Germany, carrying a 15-year-old who thinks a nutmeg's food.
Gayden beats Zach, proving Czechia only shows up to get smoked.
Sim likes Gunner at 25%, but a hungry teenager just crashed the party.
